---
title: "Andy's Projects & Posts"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 6
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories, reading-time]
---

Welcome! This is a collection of my projects, analyses, and write-ups across data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence. Each post walks through the problem, methodology, and key findings. So please have a look and feel free to reach out if anything catches your eye.
